transcript.text: Hello, Living in Lafayette V-Log, the 3rd of May, 2013.
Today I started to bring stuff together.
I slept kind of in until like 9.30.
It was like 12 hours of sleep because I couldn't sleep well last night at all
Because I couldn't breathe because I fucking smoked that weed yesterday,
Which is such a mistake.
No more weed for me all year, man.
Not until January when they legalize.
I'm going to get fucked up.
And I also couldn't breathe because I painted lacquer all over my little biker stand
And I only gave it like an hour to dry and it's still kind of like drying
And there's no circulation in my room.
And I didn't have any doors open or windows because it's kind of cold.
So I finally opened up the door to the living room.
I should have had that all night.
But I finally slept in.
Had a nice dream until 9.30 from like sunrise to 9.30,
But I don't remember what it was.
But I'll start remembering.
It's great to have dreams and remember them now that I was sleeping deeply.
Yeah, but then I got up and I just did random things.
I finished organizing computer files or whatever and figuring some more stuff out
With my bike computer.
Now I think I can make a little program so that I don't have to manually stop
When I want to do the races for one kilometer and all that kind of stuff.
And I switched out cleats on my bike because I wanted to give pedals and shoes to my brother.
That will complete his mountain bike.
And then, so then I used just the same shoes for both, for my road bike and my mountain bike.
And they work, the Shimano's work better than those egg beater ones anyways
Because they're more tight.
You know, I want to like be able to sprint and all that kind of stuff.
Yeah, so yeah, I did a lot.
I filmed myself lifting weights for the first time in a couple years.
You know, more like more than one video for the first time in like four years.
If you look at the early videos, that used to be what my channel was all about,
Just when we were lifting weights and stuff.
But I mean, breaking those records is pretty easy.
I'm totally out of shape and I can still break the records.
So I must not have been that strong back then.
Yeah, so I'm excited about that.
Hopefully maybe somebody could send me response videos and beat me.
Or maybe they'll just do what they did before and be little bitches
And tell me I'm doing it wrong or I'm weak or something.
But I'm the one with the videos, so.
And yeah, the two talking videos.
So that's cool.
I want to start doing talking videos already.
I tried to listen to an autobiography of a yogi.
It's not that interesting.
There's some parts that are interesting, but most of it's not.
So I just put it on fast.
If you're listening to a book that's not that interesting,
I just put it on fast to try to hammer through it.
And then I can be like, okay, at least I don't know what the book's about.
So I'll do that one at night, laying in bed.
You know, until I get too sleepy, that I'm not really paying attention.
And then I'd be cheating to keep it on.
So I turn it off, but I'm not totally paying attention.
I did a little bit of stretching today.
Good start.
Yeah, I think I'll pick up with the limberity where I left off before.
I think it may still be possible for me to do the splits.
I think being able to do the splits will definitely aid my strength as an athlete,
As a runner and a rider for sure.
So I'm going to definitely donate a lot of time to that.
And also, you know, if I do that, I'm not going to work on the computer thing while I stretch
Because I'm going to be able to actually stretch.
I'll be listening to my audiobooks.
It'll be time to listen to audiobooks.
I want to get into the habit of every single time I work on my computer to do it while I'm on the rollers, dude.
Because I can concentrate just great, you know, and then write at the same time.
It's awesome.
I was kind of tired today, though, from all that writing I did yesterday.
I needed to get an update for my computer software, and I think that's why the second ride I did never made it to Strava.
It makes it just fine on the Garmin website with all the data.
It says, you know, 44.6 miles.
But on Strava, the same ride, the same program, because I downloaded it off of Garmin, it says that it's only 0.4 kilometers.
So I guess it was just because the firmware was bad.
No, I can't download, like, the settings off of Garmin to my computer.
So I'll call them and see if they can do that for me tomorrow, help me figure that out tomorrow, just little glitches like that.
But, yeah, just tying it all together.
I was busy all day, and it kind of seems like I didn't do that much.
But, you know, when you tie a lot of stuff together, it's kind of time-consuming.
And, yeah, I'm motivated.
I know a lot of stuff I need to do, you know, tying stuff together on the computer that I'll do next time.
I have the time just on the rollers.
But tomorrow, I think I'm going to go on an actual bike ride outside, because I've never, you know, it'll be my first ride outside, so I'm excited for that.
But maybe I'll do one of the popular courses, you know, and see how fast I am, how slow I am compared to everybody else.
Yeah, so it's like 8.16 now.
I'm going to pop this sucker in, you know, upload it, leave the computer there.
It's so great living in a house, because I can just have the computer on all night long, and I can upload as many freaking videos as I want.
And I like the way that the new YouTube is set up, where you look at your subscriptions for the day, and it just shows that you're this.
And I knew they were going to eventually do this, and I'm glad they finally did it, where it shows, you know, all the people you're subscribed to.
And it only shows one of their videos, and you click the little arrow to see more of the videos they do.
So that way, you don't have to see all my videos clogging up everybody else's videos, because people would always unsubscribe to me because of that, because I was uploading too many videos.
But now I can upload as many as I want, and people won't have a reason to unsubscribe me because I'm uploading too many videos, because all I see is I didn't want it.
If they're curious to see the other videos I did, they can just hit the arrow to the right, see all the videos, and then click on the video that I wanted to watch.
So hopefully that'll work out for me.
And, yeah, that's all I really have to say for now.
I'm going to go for a ride tomorrow.
Wish me luck.
It's going to be fun.
I'll upload the ride to it.
And that'll kind of complete my whole preparation.
I'll be, like, up to speed after that.
And then on Monday I'm going to call the people who I'm going to work for this summer and see if they can, you know, see where that's going, like, if I can start working soon.
So, peace out.
